title: fumana glutinosa f. hispidula
intro: Fumana glutinosa f. hispidula, also known as a form of the shrubby cinquefoil, is a plant species within the rose family that is commonly found in the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Fumana glutinosa f. hispidula include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive problems, such as diarrhea and dyspepsia, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Fumana glutinosa f. hispidula can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional folk medicine, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
